subject: NTTT Functions - GitHub Repo & CI/CD Ready
body:
Hey Compas,

GitHub repo and CI/CD pipeline are set up!

## Repository
https://github.com/ybotman/nttt-functions

## Branch Strategy

| Branch | Purpose | CI/CD |
|--------|---------|-------|
| `DEVL` | Working branch, cross-machine sync | None |
| `TEST` | Staging | Auto-deploy to nttt-functions-test |
| `PROD` | Production | Auto-deploy to nttt-functions-prod |

## Endpoints (once deployed)

**TEST**: `https://nttt-functions-test.azurewebsites.net/api/nttt/...`
**PROD**: `https://nttt-functions-prod.azurewebsites.net/api/nttt/...`

| Endpoint | Description |
|----------|-------------|
| `/api/nttt/health` | Health check |
| `/api/nttt/users/{userId}/analytics/orchestras` | Orchestra stats |
| `/api/nttt/users/{userId}/analytics/singers` | Singer stats |
| `/api/nttt/users/{userId}/analytics/recommendations` | Study recommendations |
| `/api/nttt/users/{userId}/analytics/grid?gameType=X` | Grid cell stats |

## Pending (Ybotman)

1. Create Azure Function Apps (nttt-functions-test, nttt-functions-prod)
2. Configure GitHub secrets for OIDC auth
3. Add Firebase credentials to Azure config

## Your Next Steps

1. Update NTTT to capture `correctOrchestra`/`userGuess` in session results
2. Store per-orchestra stats in Firestore at:
   `users/{uid}/gameStats/orchestra-quiz/orchestras/{orchestraName}`
3. Once Azure is configured, we can test the endpoints

Let me know if the Firestore structure needs adjusting!

-- Fulton
